mapper.update: UPDATE rules SET trigger_count = trigger_count + 1, success_count = success_count + 1, last_trigger_at = #{triggeredAt}, updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE rules SET trigger_count = trigger_count + 1, error_count = error_count + 1, last_trigger_at = #{triggeredAt}, updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{id}
